Descriptions.ShortDescription: Start/stop RTSP timelapse capture and render videos from your N.I.N.A. sequence - the app can auto-upload each finished timelapse to Discord.
Descriptions.LongDescription:
**RTSP Timelapse Capture** is a free, open-source (MIT) Windows app that turns any RTSP / IP camera (security cams, all-sky cameras, webcams) into a hands-off timelapse studio. This plugin lets N.I.N.A. drive it as part of your imaging sequence.

### What the app does
- Capture stills from any RTSP stream on a set interval, with rock-solid reconnection (about 5s timestamp accuracy, 100% capture success rate).
- Smart overnight scheduling with twilight calculations (civil / nautical / astronomical darkness) or manual times, planned across a calendar.
- One-click MP4 export with presets: frame rate, speed-up, CRF quality and resolution.
- Auto-create the video after each night's session and auto-post it to a Discord channel.
- Minimize-to-tray and start-with-Windows for unattended, headless rigs.

### What this plugin adds
Sequencer instructions to **Start Capture**, **Stop Capture** and **Create Timelapse Video**, plus an imaging-tab dock panel showing live capture status. Let N.I.N.A. run your scenery or all-sky timelapse for exactly the duration of your imaging session, then render it automatically. Create Timelapse Video honours the app's Discord settings, so the finished clip can post straight to your Discord channel.

### Get the app
Download / docs: **https://github.com/HiranD/RTSP-Timelapse-Capture**

Requires the RTSP Timelapse app running on the **same PC** with the remote control API enabled (Integrations tab). The connection is loopback-only (127.0.0.1), so NINA and the app must share one machine.
